name: 145 MG Fenofibrate Tablets IP
about: 145 MG Fenofibrate Tablets IP is a general medicine used to treat high cholesterol levels and other lipid disorders. These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a box of 15x10 tablets. The recommended dosage of this medicine is 145mg, as prescribed by a doctor. The physical form of the medicine is in tablets that should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.a: The recommended dosage of 145 MG Fenofibrate Tablets IP is 145mg, as prescribed by a doctor.

faq.a: The physical form of 145 MG Fenofibrate Tablets IP is in tablets.

faq.a: 145 MG Fenofibrate Tablets IP is manufactured in India.

faq.a: 145 MG Fenofibrate Tablets IP should be stored in a dry and cool place.
